access.closed: This bot is closed for personal use.
error.daily_free_limit: the service's daily free-generation limit is used up. Try again after 00:00 UTC, or subscribe — /subscribe
error.generation_failed:
summary generation for the video {link} was interrupted.

Reason: {reason}
error.heavy_quota: this video has no captions and is longer than an hour — that generation costs 2 quota units, and you have {remaining} left. Subscribe: /subscribe
error.service_budget: The service has temporarily used up its daily generation budget. Please try again later.
error.temporary_overload: generation is temporarily unavailable (model overload). Please try again in a few minutes.
help.external_extra:
/subscribe - subscription
/paysupport - billing questions

Free: {starter} summaries to start, then {weekly} per week. Subscription {price} ⭐/mo — {monthly} summaries a month: /subscribe. Remaining quota: /limits.
help.public:
Available commands:
/start - get started
/help - help
/last - last 20 summaries
/limits - remaining quota

Send me a YouTube video link — I'll reply here with a short summary and publish the full writeup to Telegra.ph.
limits.starter:
Starter summaries left: {remaining} of {starter}.
After that — {weekly} per week for free, or subscribe: /subscribe.
limits.subscriber:
Subscription active until {date}.
Remaining this month: {remaining} of {monthly}.
limits.weekly_available:
Free summaries available this week: {remaining} of {weekly}.
More with a subscription at {price} ⭐/mo: /subscribe.
limits.weekly_exhausted:
Your free limit for this week is used up.
Subscription {price} ⭐/mo — {monthly} summaries: /subscribe.
paysupport.text: For billing and refund questions, message {contact}. Refunds are processed manually within 1–2 days.
premiere.deferred: This is a premiere: the video {title_link} releases {release}. I'll come back with a summary around {return_time} — {hours} h after release.
premiere.no_store: The video {title_link} is a premiere that hasn't been released yet. Send the link again after it's out.
premiere.unknown_release: The video {title_link} is a premiere, and I couldn't determine its release time. I'll try to make a summary at {return_time}.
quota.denied.monthly: Your monthly subscription limit is used up ({monthly} summaries). New generations become available as the 30-day rolling window frees up — /limits.
quota.denied.weekly:
Your free limit for this week is used up.

Subscription — {price} ⭐/mo: {monthly} summaries a month, auto-renews, cancel anytime.
Remaining quota: /limits.
start.allowlist:
Send me a YouTube video link. I'll reply here with a short summary and publish the full writeup to Telegra.ph.

You have unlimited access 🎉
start.bad_deeplink: I couldn't parse the link parameter. Open the YouTube video and tap the “Summary” button again — it should send an 11-character video_id.
start.onboarding: 👋 Hi! I make summaries of YouTube videos. Send me a link to a video — I'll reply here with a short digest (what it's about, reading time, tags, top comment), and publish the full chapter-by-chapter writeup to Telegra.ph. What I can do: • videos without captions — I transcribe the audio myself • premieres — I'll remember and come back with a summary after release • already-processed videos are delivered instantly and for free Plans: 🆓 Free — {starter} summaries right away, then {weekly} per week ⭐ Subscription {price} ⭐/mo — {monthly} summaries a month and priority generation speed: /subscribe A long video without captions (over an hour) counts as 2 summaries. /limits — remaining quota · /help — all commands
status.audio_download: Downloading audio for transcription via Groq...
status.captions: Trying to get YouTube's built-in captions...
status.heavy_charge: This video has no captions and is over an hour long — it will use 2 generations.
status.publishing: Publishing the full writeup to Telegra.ph...
status.queued_first: Added the video to the summary queue. Starting processing.
status.queued_position: Added the video to the queue. Position: {position}.
status.transcribe_done: Transcription finished. Returning to the summary queue...
status.transcribe_queue: Captions unavailable. Sending to the transcription queue via Groq Whisper...
status.transcribing: Transcribing audio via Groq Whisper Large v3 Turbo...
subscribe.activated: Subscription active until {date} — {monthly} summaries a month. Remaining: /limits. Thank you! 🔮
subscribe.invoice_description: {monthly} summaries a month. Auto-renews every 30 days, cancel anytime in Telegram settings.
subscribe.pitch:
Subscription: {monthly} summaries a month for {price} ⭐.
Billing questions: /paysupport.
telegraph.chapters_failed: Couldn't extract a detailed breakdown of the key points — the model returned an incomplete response. The executive summary above is still valid.
text.channel_only_video: Send a link to a single YouTube video.
text.not_youtube: That's not a YouTube link ({host}). I only handle YouTube — send a video or channel URL.
text.send_link_hint: I only make summaries of YouTube videos. Send me a video link — or /help to see the commands.
text.unparseable_link: Couldn't parse that link. Send a YouTube video or channel URL.
transcript.not_saved: The transcript wasn't saved for this video (processed before this feature existed).
transcript.subscribers_only: Downloading the transcript requires a subscription — /subscribe
ytdlp.age_restricted: The video is age-restricted — YouTube requires a login. The bot can't process it.
ytdlp.geo_blocked: The video is blocked by the copyright holder in the bot's region.
ytdlp.geo_restricted: The video is blocked in the region the bot operates from.
ytdlp.live_event: This is an ongoing live stream — it can't be summarized until it ends.
ytdlp.members_only: The video is available to channel members only (members-only). The bot can't process it without authentication.
ytdlp.premiere_not_started: This is a premiere that hasn't started yet — there's no actual video yet.
ytdlp.private: The video is marked Private. It's only available to people with a direct invite link from the author.
ytdlp.removed: The video has been removed from YouTube.
ytdlp.removed_by_uploader: The video was removed by the uploader.
ytdlp.sign_in_required: YouTube requires a login to watch (anti-bot or age check). The bot can't get past it.
ytdlp.stream_recording_unavailable: The live stream recording is unavailable.
ytdlp.unavailable: The video is unavailable (deleted by the author, blocked by the copyright holder, or hidden in this region).
